mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.status, a.visibility, a.is_pinned, c.name AS category_name, a.word_count, a.view_count, a.published_at, a.updated_at, a.version FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id
ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, title, slug, summary, content_markdown, content_html, category_id, status, visibility, is_pinned, allow_comment, word_count, reading_minutes, view_count, meta_title, meta_description, canonical_url, published_at, created_at, updated_at, version FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT tag_id FROM article_tag WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY tag_id
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM category WHERE id = #{id})

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT id, name, slug FROM category WHERE visible = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, name
SELECT id, name, slug FROM tag WHERE visible = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, name
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, summary = #{summary}, content_markdown = #{markdown}, content_html = #{html}, content_plain = #{plain}, category_id = #{categoryId}, visibility = #{visibility}, is_pinned = #{pinned}, allow_comment = #{allowComment}, word_count = #{wordCount}, reading_minutes = #{readingMinutes}, meta_title = #{metaTitle}, meta_description = #{metaDescription}, canonical_url = #{canonicalUrl}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE article SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = COALESCE(published_at, #{publishedAt}), scheduled_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'SCHEDULED', 'ARCHIVED')
UPDATE article SET status = 'DRAFT', scheduled_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
UPDATE article SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), status = 'ARCHIVED', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO url_redirect (old_slug, target_path, http_status, enabled) VALUES (#{oldSlug}, #{targetPath}, 301, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_path = VALUES(target_path), http_status = 301, enabled = 1
